title: Baked Ukrainian Lasagna
description: A comforting and creamy Ukrainian-inspired lasagna dish.
instructions: Cook lasagna noodles according to package instructions.
Brown ground beef in a skillet over medium-high heat. Drain excess fat.
Add chopped onion and minced garlic to the skillet and saute until softened.
Stir in tomato sauce and bring to a simmer.
In a large bowl, combine softened cream cheese and sour cream.
Stir in shredded mozzarella and cheddar cheese.
Spread a layer of tomato sauce on the bottom of a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Arrange 4 lasagna noodles on top of the sauce.
Spread a layer of the cream cheese mixture on top of the noodles.
Repeat the layers two more times, ending with a layer of cheese on top.
Cover the baking dish with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
